findings.rule: Modal/bottom-sheet must carry role="dialog" + aria-modal="true" + an accessible name (aria-label OR a resolving aria-labelledby)
findings.evidence: div.modal-box — role=null aria-modal=null name=MISSING (no aria-label and no resolving aria-labelledby)

findings.rule: Toggle/segmented buttons must expose aria-pressed (true|false) in parity with the .active class
Toggle/segmented buttons must expose aria-pressed (true|false) in parity with the .active class
Auto-updating regions (toasts, connection/presence chips) must be ARIA live regions (role=status/alert + aria-live)
findings.evidence: button#wh-conn-chip — auto-update region without role=status/alert or aria-live

findings.rule: A keyboard skip-to-content link improves operability for keyboard/AT users
